cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out if Millie tells the truth. Hmm, so we have a bunch of people making statements about each other. Let me list them out again to keep track. 1. Ka lies. 2. Andree says Ka tells the truth. 3. Audrie says Andree lies. 4. Antwan says Audrie tells the truth. 5. Millie says Antwan tells the truth. The question is whether Millie is telling the truth. So, if I can determine if Antwan tells the truth or lies, then I can figure out if Millie is truthful because Millie's statement depends on Antwan's. Starting with the first statement: Ka lies.
